title: dryopteris munita
intro: Dryopteris munita, also known as Mountain Shield Fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of the Pacific Northwest in North America. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris munita are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, which are known to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote overall well-being. Dryopteris munita can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
